message:
Harden stats rendering and service worker message handling

stats.js:
- Replace inline style= attributes on term tags and role bars with
  data-* attributes (data-term-size, data-term-opacity, data-role-width)
- Add applyDynamicStatsStyles() that reads data attributes and applies
  clamped numeric values to element styles after render, preventing
  potential CSS injection via untrusted data in inline styles
- Term font-size clamped to [0.8, 1.4]em, opacity to [0.6, 1]
- Role bar width clamped to [0, 100]%

sw.js:
- Validate event.data is a non-null object before destructuring in the
  message handler, preventing TypeError on malformed payloads
- Verify type is a non-empty string before dispatching, with WARN-level
  log entries for rejected messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
